# allCompositions()

**Instance Method**

Returns an array that contains all compositions currently in the composition repository.

## Declaration

```swift
func allCompositions() -> [Any]!
```

## Return Value

An array of [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/QCComposition] objects.

## Fetching Compositions

- **composition(withIdentifier:)**: Returns the composition that corresponds to the identifier.
- **compositions(withProtocols:andAttributes:)**: Returns an array of compositions that match a set of criteria.

items.description: Returns the composition that corresponds to the identifier.
items.name: composition(withIdentifier:)

items.description: Returns an array of compositions that match a set of criteria.
items.name: compositions(withProtocols:andAttributes:)
